superPanel.tableOfContentsDesc: Quickly generate document TOC and outline
superPanel.pageLockDesc: Lock page to prevent accidental editing
superPanel.generalSettingsDesc: Font, heading, code block and other general configurations
superPanel.dataBackupDesc: Workspace backup, auto backup and cloud sync
superPanel.qrCodeDesc: Generate QR codes from text or links
superPanel.thinkingDesc: Enable deep thinking before answering, ideal for complex reasoning tasks
superPanel.resourceManagerDesc: Manage Siyuan asset files: view, rename, insert, and clean up resources
superPanel.heatmapMarkerDesc: Automatically marks English words from the wordbook in documents, showing a heatmap gradient based on practice count
superPanel.skillsViewerDesc: View and manage AI coding tools Skills configuration files
superPanel.themeColorDesc: Apply warm orange global theme color
